name: Ninjas Return
description: Help our ninja hero save his beloved wife from the evil Dark Ninja! To progress, you must explore the forest and collect exactly 3 pink stars in each level. Finding them all unlocks a magical portal at the finish line, showering the area in falling sakura leaves. Enter the portal to reach the next stage. Complete your journey to save your wife waiting at the final level!
instructions: Controls Left Right Arrow Keys Move left or right Up Arrow Key Jump over obstacles A Key Swing your sword to attack enemies S Key Throw your chain
